FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class ToolTip

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A WinUI ToolTip (framework ToolTip + ToolTipService): wraps a target element and surfaces a small text bubble anchored above it (or at the pointer in Mouse). 1:1 with the framework's automatic-tooltip behavior:

  • Hover trigger — pointer-over the target opens the bubble after the initial show delay (SPI_GETMOUSEHOVERTIME 400ms × 2 = 800ms; a re-show within BetweenShowDelayMs = 200ms uses the reshow delay — see MouseReshowDelayMs for why that is 400ms, not the spec'd 600ms). Pointer-leave cancels a PENDING open immediately (ToolTipService_Partial.cpp:1435-1442); an OPEN bubble is kept and closed by the safe-zone monitor instead — see the safe-zone item below.
  • Safe zone — an open bubble does NOT close the instant the pointer leaves the target: WinUI keeps it while the pointer is inside owner ∪ tooltip (∪ their convex hull) and a 1s check timer closes it once outside (ToolTipService_Partial.cpp:1433-1453 owner-exit only records the owner; cpp:349-381 OnSafeZoneCheck; cpp:1060-1098 IsToolTipInSafeZone; .h:22 s_safeZoneCheckTimerDuration = 1s). The engine surfaces no global pointer position, so the hull is approximated by the same 1s cadence: leaving owner ∪ bubble arms a SafeZoneCheckMs grace; re-entering either cancels it; the grace elapsing closes the bubble.
  • Keyboard trigger — KEYBOARD focus landing inside the target opens the bubble after 800ms (×2, normal AND reshow: ToolTipService_Partial.cpp:1777-1779), exactly WinUI's OnOwnerGotFocus gate (ToolTipService_Partial.cpp:1648-1664: only FocusState::Keyboard shows the tooltip — pointer focus does not). Focus leaving closes it (cpp:1696-1706 OnOwnerLostFocus → OnOwnerLeaveInternal).
  • Press dismiss — a pointer press over the target closes an open (or pending) bubble, and it stays closed until the pointer LEAVES and re-enters (classic tooltip behavior; WinUI 3's ToolTipService itself registers no PointerPressed handler — it closes via safe-zone exit monitoring, ToolTipService_Partial.cpp:1437-1453 — but cannot re-open a dismissed owner until a real leave + re-enter either, cpp:725-737 CancelAutomaticToolTip).
  • Auto-dismiss — an open bubble closes itself after ShowDurationMs (SPI_GETMESSAGEDURATION default 5s), and the dismissal LATCHES like press dismiss: WinUI's only show trigger is PointerEntered (ToolTipService_Partial.cpp:1395-1418), so in-place hover moves can never re-open a timed-out tooltip — it takes a real leave + re-enter.
  • No click trigger — the wrapper adds NO OnClick (ToolTipService registers none, ToolTipService_Partial.cpp:176-220), so a tooltipped element is never a tab stop by itself.

Chrome matches ToolTip_themeresources.xaml: AcrylicInAppFillColorDefault fill, 1px SurfaceStrokeColorFlyout stroke, ControlCornerRadius (4px) corners, the light tooltip elevation (Tooltip), 9,6,9,8 padding, 12px TextFillColorPrimary text, MaxWidth 320, TextWrapping=Wrap. Open/close are the WinUI FadeIn/FadeOutThemeAnimation fades (167ms — Raw in the overlay host). The bubble does NOT trap focus and does NOT light-dismiss on outside click (None) — dismissal is owned by hover-leave/focus-leave/press + the auto-dismiss timer, exactly like ToolTipService.

public sealed class ToolTip : Component

Fields

BetweenShowDelayMs

BETWEEN_SHOW_DELAY_MS = 200ms (ToolTipService_Partial.h:17) — a re-open inside this window of the last close uses the reshow delay (cpp:659 GetTickCount() - s_lastToolTipOpenedTime < BETWEEN_SHOW_DELAY_MS).

public const float BetweenShowDelayMs = 200

Field Value

float

KeyboardPlacementOffset

DEFAULT_KEYBOARD_OFFSET = 12 (ToolTip_Partial.h:10) — the dock-rect inflation when the tooltip was opened by keyboard focus.

public const float KeyboardPlacementOffset = 12

Field Value

float

KeyboardShowDelayMs

Keyboard show delay: hover time × 2 = 800ms for BOTH normal and reshow (ToolTipService_Partial.cpp:1777-1779 — Keyboard ignores isReshow).

public const float KeyboardShowDelayMs = 800

Field Value

float

MouseHoverTimeMs

SPI_GETMOUSEHOVERTIME default (DEFAULT_SPI_GETMOUSEHOVERTIME, ToolTipService_Partial.h:18) = 400ms.

public const float MouseHoverTimeMs = 400

Field Value

float

MousePlacementOffset

DEFAULT_MOUSE_OFFSET = 20 (ToolTip_Partial.h:11): target-mode placement inflates the dock rect by this on BOTH axes for a mouse-opened automatic tooltip before positioning (ToolTip_Partial.cpp:1224-1258 InflateRect(&rcDockTo, horizontalOffset, verticalOffset) + :1275).

public const float MousePlacementOffset = 20

Field Value

float

MousePlacementVerticalOffset

Pointer-mode vertical offset below the cursor — ToolTip_Partial.h:56 m_mousePlacementVerticalOffset = 11 (the brief's "14px" did not survive source verification).

public const float MousePlacementVerticalOffset = 11

Field Value

float

MouseReshowDelayMs

Mouse RE-show delay = 400ms (× 1), NOT the spec-comment's × 1.5 = 600ms: the shipping code is ticks *= static_cast<INT64>(isReshow ? 1.5 : 2) (ToolTipService_Partial.cpp:1775) and the C++ static_cast<INT64>(1.5) TRUNCATES to 1 — behavior parity follows the compiled code, not the comment table at cpp:1737-1742.

public const float MouseReshowDelayMs = 400

Field Value

float

MouseShowDelayMs

Mouse initial show delay: hover time × 2 = 800ms (GetInitialShowDelay, Mouse, first show — ToolTipService_Partial.cpp:1774-1775).

public const float MouseShowDelayMs = 800

Field Value

float

OpenOnMount 

public bool OpenOnMount

Field Value

bool

PartBubble

The text bubble surface (the control-built chrome inside the raw overlay host — acrylic fill, flyout stroke, 4px corners, tooltip elevation, 9,6,9,8 padding). Owned: Children (the Text content) and the hover handlers (safe-zone tracking).

public const string PartBubble = "Bubble"

Field Value

string

Parts

Lightweight per-part styling (CSS ::part): modifiers keyed by the PartXxx consts; see TemplateParts for the contract.

public TemplateParts? Parts

Field Value

TemplateParts

Placement

WinUI ToolTip.Placement (Top/Mouse subset). Default Top — the WinUI default (ToolTip_Partial.cpp:1119-1122).

public ToolTipPlacementMode Placement

Field Value

ToolTipPlacementMode

SafeZoneCheckMs

s_safeZoneCheckTimerDuration = 1s (ToolTipService_Partial.h:22) — the safe-zone poll cadence; the bubble closes once the pointer has been outside owner ∪ bubble for one full check interval.

public const float SafeZoneCheckMs = 1000

Field Value

float

ShowDurationMs

DEFAULT_SHOW_DURATION_SECONDS = 5s — auto-dismiss after this long open.

public const float ShowDurationMs = 5000

float

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
